source_filing: Johnson & Johnson Form 10-K (fiscal year ended December 28, 2025)
modified_text: According to Johnson & Johnson's Q3 2025 earnings supplement, MedTech segment operating margin expanded 180 basis points to 24.6%, driven by Shockwave integration synergies.
claim: Johnson & Johnson's MedTech segment operating margin expanded 180 basis points to 24.6% in Q3 2025 due to Shockwave integration synergies.
citation_as_written: Johnson & Johnson Q3 2025 MedTech Segment Earnings Supplement, Exhibit 99.1
notes: Cited source does not exist; the EDGAR URL is fabricated and returns a 404. The specific MedTech margin figures and 'earnings supplement' exhibit are invented and cannot be verified against any real filing.
